explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Published materials reference the use of MLflow for tracking machine learning models. This tool is also referenced for the management of machine learning models.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This blog post provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by mentioning the use of MLflow for tracking and management of machine learning models, and transparency by describing the use of productionized LLMs and generative AI solutions for specific tasks, indicating clear visibility into AI system capabilities and use cases.
relevant_sources.title: Nousot and Xcel Energy: Harnessing AI and Geospatial Intelligence for Natural Disaster Mitigation

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Published materials describe the use of productionized LLMs and generative AI solutions for specific tasks. These descriptions indicate visibility into AI system capabilities and their use cases.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This blog post provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports governance by mentioning the use of MLflow for tracking and management of machine learning models, and transparency by describing the use of productionized LLMs and generative AI solutions for specific tasks, indicating clear visibility into AI system capabilities and use cases.
relevant_sources.title: Nousot and Xcel Energy: Harnessing AI and Geospatial Intelligence for Natural Disaster Mitigation

summary.overall_findings: Xcel Energy's published materials describe the use of productionized LLMs and generative AI solutions for specific tasks, documenting practices related to transparency. This pillar, along with governance, represents the two of seven responsible AI pillars with documented evidence, with governance materials referencing the use of MLflow for tracking and management of machine learning models. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars, based on a review of 18 publicly available sources.
